## Why
<!-- problem, motivation, related issue -->

## How
<!-- approach, notable decisions, trade-offs -->

## Verification
- [ ] `dotnet build` clean
- [ ] `dotnet test` green
- [ ] `dotnet format --verify-no-changes` clean
- [ ] Manual smoke test (describe)

## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional Commits in the squash subject
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Public APIs in Domain / Application have XML doc comments
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` updated if a rule changed
- [ ] ADR added under `docs/decisions/` if the decision is hard to reverse
